01-the-voice-revolution.instruction: List 5 applications of AI voice/audio in business. Each: current state (what's possible) and one limitation.
01-the-voice-revolution.successMessage: Understanding capabilities AND limitations is key.

02-text-to-speech-basics.instruction: Write a prompt for a TTS-optimized script. Include SSML hints (pauses, emphasis), pacing markers, pronunciation notes.
02-text-to-speech-basics.successMessage: TTS-optimized writing sounds natural. Regular writing sounds robotic.

03-voice-cloning-and-custom-voices.instruction: Creating a custom AI brand voice: characteristics you'd want, ethical considerations, consent process, use cases.
03-voice-cloning-and-custom-voices.successMessage: Voice cloning with consent and ethics. Responsible usage.

04-podcast-production.instruction: Generate a complete podcast episode outline: intro hook, segments, talking points, transitions, outro CTA.
04-podcast-production.successMessage: Structure turns rambling into compelling listening.

05-audiobook-creation.instruction: Plan AI-assisted audiobook production: chapter prep, voice selection, quality checks, full pipeline.
05-audiobook-creation.successMessage: AI audiobooks are a real revenue stream.

06-music-and-sound-design.instruction: Write a creative brief for AI-generated background music: mood, tempo, instruments, duration, intended use.
06-music-and-sound-design.successMessage: Detailed brief = exact vibe, every time.

07-transcription-and-analysis.instruction: Write a prompt: take a meeting transcript and extract key topics, sentiment shifts, action items, 1-paragraph summary.
07-transcription-and-analysis.successMessage: Hours of audio into actionable intelligence in seconds.

08-voice-interfaces.instruction: Design a voice interface for customer service: greeting flow, misunderstood input handling, escalation, personality.
08-voice-interfaces.successMessage: Voice UX designed for edge cases that matter.

09-audio-editing-with-ai.instruction: 5 audio editing tasks AI automates. Each: manual process replaced, AI tool/technique, quality vs manual.
09-audio-editing-with-ai.successMessage: AI audio editing is mature and useful. You know the toolkit.

10-your-audio-studio.instruction: Design your AI audio studio: tools, content to produce, workflow, distribution plan.
10-your-audio-studio.successMessage: Complete audio studio powered by AI. Time to record.
